testcase.name: Create an activity when no project leader is assigned
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Create an activity when no project leader is assigned &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/CreateActivity.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has no project leader&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" is assigned to the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" creates an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe activity "Testing" is added to the project&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Create an activity with a duplicate name
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Create an activity with a duplicate name &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/CreateActivity.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" is the project leader of the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project leader creates an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe error message "Activity already exists" is given&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Add an employee to an activity successfully
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add an employee to an activity successfully &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/Employee.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthere is an employee with initials "ber"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" is added to activity "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36memployee is added to activity "Testing"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Add an employee who is already assigned
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add an employee who is already assigned &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/Employee.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthere is an employee with initials "ber"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" is assigned to the activity "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" is added to activity "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe error message "Employee is already assigned to the activity" is given&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee is available
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee is available &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/EmployeeAvailability.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is an employee with initials "bap"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthere is a nemployee with initials "ber"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" has no activities in week 12 of 2026&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project leader checks availability for week 12 of 2026&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" is listed as available&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Employee is not available
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee is not available &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/EmployeeAvailability.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is an employee with initials "ber"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" is assigned to an activity in week 12 of 2026&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project leader checks availability for week 12 of 2026&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" is not listed as available&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: View total time spent on project
testcase.system-out: Scenario: View total time spent on project &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/ProjectReport.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" is the project leader of the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "ber" has registered 20 hours on activity "Testing" on date "2026-03-16"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project leader requests a project report&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe report shows 20 total hours spent on the project&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: View report for non-existing activity
testcase.system-out: Scenario: View report for non-existing activity &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/ProjectReport.feature:13&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" is the project leader of the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project leader requests time used on activity "gnitseT"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe error message "Activity does not exist" is given&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Assign a project leader succesfully
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Assign a project leader succesfully &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/Projectleader.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthere is an employee with initials "bap"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" is assigned as project leader&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" is the project leader of the project&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Edit already registered time
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Edit already registered time &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/UpdateAndNegativeContribution.feature:4&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is an employee with initials "bap"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" has registered 4 hours on activity "Testing" on date "2026-03-22"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" changes the registered hours to 6 on activity "Testing" on date "2026-03-22"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" views registered hours for date "2026-03-22"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36m6 hours are registered for employee "bap" on activity "Testing" on date "2026-03-22"&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Register negative hours
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register negative hours &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/com/example/UpdateAndNegativeContribution.feature:13&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthere is a project with name "Testing26001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe project has an activity with name "Testing"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthere is an employee with initials "bap"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe employee "bap" registers -2 hours on activity "Testing" on date "2026-03-22"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe error message "Hours must be positive" is given&amp#27;[0m
